steps.title: Match corresponding angles
steps.content: The triangles are congruent, with $A$ corresponding to $D$ and right angle $B$ corresponding to right angle $E$. The remaining angles $C$ and $F$ correspond.

steps.title: Find the remaining angle
steps.content:
In triangle ABC, the angle measures sum to $180^\circ$:
$$34^\circ+90^\circ+C=180^\circ$$
$$C=56^\circ$$
Since angle C corresponds to angle F, angle F measures $56^\circ$.
The answer is 56.
